## Checklist

- [ ] `swift build` and `swift test` pass locally
- [ ] `swiftformat .` and `swiftlint` are clean
- [ ] New behavior has test coverage; bug fixes include a regression test
- [ ] Docs (README, ARCHITECTURE.md, site/) updated if this changes behavior they describe
- [ ] Rebased onto `master`
